ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "tweet_text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was last updated */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies */,
  "is_retweet" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the tweet is a retweet */,
  "original_tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the original tweet if this is a retweet */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the tweet was posted */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to post the tweet */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Score representing the overall sentiment of the tweet */,
  "aggression_score" REAL /* Score representing the aggression level of the tweet */,
  "emotion_score" REAL /* Score representing the emotional tone of the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_original_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("original_tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, content moderator, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or description */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "tweets_count" INTEGER /* Number of tweets posted by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_words" (
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target word */,
  "word" TEXT /* The target word */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or context of the target word */,
  "is_sensitive" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the word is sensitive */,
  "is_vulgar" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the word is vulgar */,
  "is_slang" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the word is slang */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the target word was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the target word was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_target_words" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target word */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was last updated */,
  "context" TEXT /* Additional context or notes about the usage of the target word in the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_target_words_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_target_words_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES target_words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "function_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "association_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet-target word association */,
  "function_type" TEXT /* Type of function (e.g., main, auxiliary) */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the function type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the vote */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vote was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vote was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_function_votes_association_id FOREIGN KEY ("association_id") REFERENCES tweet_target_words ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_function_votes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aggression_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "association_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet-target word association */,
  "aggression_level" TEXT /* Level of aggression (e.g., high, low) */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the aggression level */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the vote */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vote was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vote was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aggression_votes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aggression_votes_association_id FOREIGN KEY ("association_id") REFERENCES tweet_target_words ("association_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emotion_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "association_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet-target word association */,
  "emotion_type" TEXT /* Type of emotion (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the emotion type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the vote */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vote was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vote was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emotion_votes_association_id FOREIGN KEY ("association_id") REFERENCES tweet_target_words ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emotion_votes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emphasis_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "association_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet-target word association */,
  "emphasis_level" TEXT /* Level of emphasis (e.g., high, low) */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the emphasis level */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the vote */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vote was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vote was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emphasis_votes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emphasis_votes_association_id FOREIGN KEY ("association_id") REFERENCES tweet_target_words ("association_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auxiliary_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "association_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet-target word association */,
  "auxiliary_role" TEXT /* Role as auxiliary (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the auxiliary role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the vote */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vote was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vote was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auxiliary_votes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auxiliary_votes_association_id FOREIGN KEY ("association_id") REFERENCES tweet_target_words ("association_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "association_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet-target word association */,
  "signal_role" TEXT /* Role as signal (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the signal role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the vote */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vote was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vote was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_votes_association_id FOREIGN KEY ("association_id") REFERENCES tweet_target_words ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_votes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nonvulgar_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "association_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet-target word association */,
  "nonvulgar_role" TEXT /* Role as non-vulgar (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the non-vulgar role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the vote */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vote was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vote was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nonvulgar_votes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nonvulgar_votes_association_id FOREIGN KEY ("association_id") REFERENCES tweet_target_words ("association_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" TEXT /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
